defects.scenarioId: The session lint check lists findings in a fixed order
defects.note: HELD-OUT, a type the baseline MISSES on train: the lint check's findings are an unordered set; asserting positional order (first Prettier, second ESLint) is flaky. Fix: assert membership, not position. Placed in held-out so Phase 5 can measure whether a GEPA winner's recall gain on determinism-order generalizes. Other two scenarios unchanged & clean.
